**Missing Data** The following states are not included due to incomplete data submitted to the National Corrections Reporting Program in 2020, though they still have parole systems: - Alabama - Alaska - Connecticut - Hawaii - Idaho - Vermont Additionally, the analysis excludes states that have abolished parole, meaning no state reports are provided for: - Arizona - California - Delaware - Florida - Illinois - Indiana - Kansas - Maine - Minnesota - New Mexico - North Carolina - Ohio - Oregon - Virginia - Washington - Wisconsin
